summary: Comprehensive authentication testing completed. Backend (17/17 tests passed), Frontend (all flows working). JWT auth, signup, login, protected routes, role-based access control all functioning correctly.

minor.issue: KeyError 'id' in logs - data structure mismatch for old analyses without 'id' field

issues: Good contrast and design - no issues found
Real-time updates indicator visible, theme toggle works

passed_tests: Backend: Login with wrong password rejected
Backend: Admin can get all users
Backend: Regular user cannot access admin endpoints
Backend: Admin can update user roles
Frontend: Signup page loads with all form elements
Frontend: User signup creates account and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: User info displayed in sidebar (name, role)
Frontend: Regular user cannot see User Management menu
Frontend: Admin can see User Management menu
Frontend: Admin can access User Management page
Frontend: User Management shows all users with role dropdowns
Frontend: Logout clears session and redirects to login
Frontend: Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
critical_code_review_comments: Backend logs show 'Error fetching analyses: id' - some old analyses may not have 'id' field, causing KeyError in get_analyses endpoint
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during backend testing for auth flow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system fully tested. JWT-based auth working with role-based access control. Admin users can access /users endpoint and User Management page. Regular users are restricted. All protected routes redirect to login when unauthenticated. Token stored in localStorage and validated via /auth/me endpoint.

mocked_apis.note: AI/CV analysis (classroom image analysis, facial recognition, anomaly detection) are MOCKED. Auth system is real JWT-based implementation.
